title: delphinium hansenii subsp. kernense
intro: Delphinium hansenii subsp. kernense, also known as Kern's larkspur, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Kern's larkspur include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Delphinium hansenii subsp. kernense typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use.
